items.title: US states are reportedly planning to sue to block Paramount's Warner Bros. takeover
items.summary: California's attorney general Rob Bonta launched a probe into the deal shortly after it was announced.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Scientists ejected from diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints
items.summary: Those ousted included ADA journal editor-in-chief Steven Kahn and former ADA president Desmond Schatz

items.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
items.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
